home.why_us.item3.title: Professional Chauffeurs

home.why_us.item4.title: Transparent Pricing

fleet.title: Our Luxury Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Select the perfect vehicle for your journey. Style, comfort, and safety guaranteed.
fleet.e_class.name: Mercedes E-Class
fleet.e_class.desc: A perfect balance of comfort, luxury, and exceptional value, ideal for business or family travel. Enjoy professional service, spacious and stylish vehicles, reliable chauffeurs, and a smooth, relaxing journey from start to finish.
fleet.s_class.name: Mercedes S-Class
fleet.s_class.desc: The pinnacle of luxury, designed for those who expect exceptional comfort, advanced technology, quiet elegance, and effortless executive travel worldwide.
fleet.v_class.name: Mercedes V-Class
fleet.v_class.desc: Spacious and luxurious group travel for VIPs, families, or executive teams, delivering elite comfort and prestige.
fleet.sprinter.name: Mercedes Sprinter
fleet.sprinter.desc: The ultimate solution for larger groups, events, and tours, delivering comfort, space, and a relaxed travel experience.
fleet.coach.name: Mercedes Coach
fleet.coach.desc: The ultimate solution for large groups and events. Professional coach service for 1–89 passengers with optional luggage trailer, built for efficiency and reliability.
fleet.amenities.title: Included Amenities
fleet.amenities.wait_time_airport: 60 min free waiting time after landing
fleet.amenities.wait_time_other: 15 min free waiting time for other services
fleet.amenities.onboard: Bottled water, mints & Wi-Fi on board
fleet.amenities.pickup_outside: Pickup outside (vehicle cannot be left unattended)
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
bruges: Medieval charm with canals, cobblestone streets, and world-famous chocolate shops.
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services.
ready.c: Ready for your next corporate ride?
faq.q1.question: What vehicles do you have?
faq.q1.answer: We offer mid-range vehicles (E-Class), luxury limousines (S-Class/V-Class), and group transport sprinters for 8 to 28 people.
faq.q2.question: Can we book multiple vehicles at once?
faq.q2.answer: Yes, absolutely! For weddings or events, we handle coordination and scheduling.
faq.q3.question: What is included in the prices?
faq.q3.answer: Standard water bottles, mints, chargers, and Wi-Fi in the car. Waiting time is included for airport arrivals (up to 60 min after landing) and the first 15 minutes are included for other services. After that, €60 per hour is charged. Special requests like child seats are negotiable.
faq.q4.question: Are you operational 24/7?
faq.q5.question: Do you also do trips abroad?
complete1: Complete step 1, then proceed to confirm your vehicle choice
faq.q6.question: Can we hire you for a tour or day trip?
faq.q6.answer: Yes, we offer customized tours with a chauffeur. Popular destinations: Keukenhof, Giethoorn, Zaanse Schans, Antwerp, Bruges, Brussels, Paris.
popular.destinations.desc: Choose from our curated multi-day tours or let us create a custom itinerary just for you
faq.q7.question: Can I book last minute?
faq.q7.answer: Yes, if there is availability. Please call for urgent requests.
faq.q8.question: Until when can I cancel free of charge?
faq.q8.answer: Up to 24 hours before the reservation. After that, we charge 100%.
faq.q9.question: What are the payment options?
faq.q9.answer: Payment link, credit card, debit card, or invoice for business travelers.
faq.q10.question: What is a Chauffeur Service?
faq.q10.answer: A chauffeur service provides luxury vehicles with professional drivers, focusing on comfort, safety, punctuality, and a smooth door-to-door travel experience.
faq.q11.question: Why choose a private chauffeur in Amsterdam?
faq.q11.answer: A private chauffeur helps you move easily through Amsterdam, avoiding traffic stress while enjoying fixed pricing, local expertise, and complete privacy.
faq.q12.question: What is a chauffeur service in Rotterdam?
faq.q12.answer: It offers reliable, premium transport in Rotterdam for business, port visits, and events, ensuring smooth travel with professional drivers and luxury vehicles.
faq.q13.question: How do I book a Schiphol Airport transfer service?
faq.q13.answer: Booking is simple online—enter your trip details, select a vehicle, and your driver tracks your flight to ensure timely pickup and smooth arrival.
faq.q14.question: Are Amsterdam Airport taxi fares fixed?
faq.q14.answer: Yes, prices are confirmed in advance, so you avoid hidden fees, traffic surprises, or delays, making travel clear, secure, and worry-free.
faq.q15.question: Is a business cab suitable for executives?
faq.q15.answer: Yes, it’s designed for executives needing quiet, comfort, and punctuality, offering luxury vehicles and professional drivers for meetings or flights.
faq.q16.question: Are wedding cars decorated for events?
faq.q16.answer: Yes, wedding vehicles can be tastefully decorated upon request, maintaining a luxurious appearance while adding elegance for your special day.
faq.q17.question: Do city tours include a private driver?
faq.q17.answer: Yes, a private driver handles routes, timing, and parking, allowing you to relax and enjoy sightseeing without planning or navigation concerns.
faq.q18.question: Are Amsterdam city tours private?
faq.q18.answer: Yes, tours are fully private, giving you flexibility, comfort, and the freedom to explore attractions at your own pace without shared rides.
faq.q19.question: Are luxury cars available for rental?
faq.q19.answer: Yes, luxury vehicles are available with a chauffeur, ideal for business travel, airport journeys, and special occasions needing premium comfort.
faq.q20.question: Can I choose a specific vehicle from the fleet?
faq.q20.answer: Yes, you can select the vehicle that fits your needs, whether for comfort, group size, or the type of journey you’re planning.
faq.q21.question: What makes Holland Vip Transfers different?
faq.q21.answer: We focus on reliability, comfort, and personal service, offering experienced drivers, fixed pricing, and well-planned journeys every time.
faq.q22.question: Which cars and vans are available?
faq.q22.answer: Our fleet includes Mercedes E-Class, S-Class, V-Class, and Sprinter Vans, suitable for luxury, group, and airport travel needs.
faq.q23.question: How can I book a ride with Holland Vip Transfer?
faq.q23.answer: You can book online through the website booking form. For assistance or special requests, call +31 20 308 60 43 or email info@hollandviptransfer.com.
faq.q24.question: How far in advance should I make a booking?
faq.q24.answer: Advance booking is recommended, but same-day and last-minute reservations are possible, subject to availability.
faq.q25.question: Can I change or cancel my booking after confirmation?
faq.q25.answer: Yes, changes or cancellations are allowed with prior notice. Contact support as soon as possible to avoid charges.
faq.q26.question: Will I receive a booking confirmation?
faq.q26.answer: Yes, a confirmation with all trip details is sent after your booking is completed.
faq.q27.question: How can I contact customer support for booking help?
faq.q27.answer: You can contact support by phone at +31 20 308 60 43 or email info@hollandviptransfer.com.
faq.q28.question: What services does Holland Vip Transfers offer?
faq.q28.answer: We provide corporate transport, airport transfers, sightseeing tours, group travel, and event transportation across the Netherlands.
faq.q29.question: Do you offer airport transfers in Amsterdam?
faq.q29.answer: Yes, reliable airport transfers are available to and from Amsterdam with professional drivers and luxury vehicles.
faq.q30.question: Can I book corporate transport services?
faq.q30.answer: Our Best corporate transport services ensure punctual, discreet, and comfortable travel for meetings and business events.
faq.q31.question: Are sightseeing tours available in the Netherlands?
faq.q31.answer: Yes, we offer Best private sightseeing tours covering Amsterdam and major attractions across Holland.
faq.q32.question: Do you provide transportation for groups and events?
faq.q32.answer: We handle group and event transport with spacious vehicles, smooth logistics, and experienced drivers.
faq.q33.question: Is advance booking required for transfers?
faq.q33.answer: Advance booking is recommended to guarantee availability, especially during peak travel and event seasons.
faq.q34.question: Are your services available outside Amsterdam?
faq.q34.answer: Yes, services are available throughout the Netherlands, including major cities and surrounding regions.
faq.q35.question: Do you offer hourly chauffeur services?
faq.q35.answer: Hourly chauffeur services are available for business trips, city travel, tours, and special occasions.
faq.q36.question: Are your drivers professional and licensed?
faq.q36.answer: All drivers are fully licensed, experienced, and trained to deliver safe and comfortable journeys.
faq.q37.question: How can I book transportation services?
faq.q37.answer: You can easily book online or contact our support team for customized transport solutions.

services.airport.title: Airport Transfers
services.airport.subtitle: First-Class Airport Transportation.
services.airport.description: Travel with complete confidence using premium airport transfers designed for ultimate comfort, timely pickups, real-time journey updates, personalized greetings, and exceptional service, ensuring a smooth, stress-free, and unforgettable travel experience every time.
services.airport.hero.title: Your Journey Begins And Ends Stress-Free
services.airport.hero.description: Whether you're arriving at Schiphol Airport or catching a flight, we ensure your transfer is smooth, punctual, and luxurious, anytime, day or night. We monitor your flight in real time and adjust accordingly to delays or early arrivals. Our professional chauffeur greets you with a name sign, assists with your luggage, and guides you all the way to your door, terminal, or VIP Airport Lounge. Choose our Schiphol Airport Transfers, Luxury Airport Service, and Amsterdam Car Service for reliable, comfortable, and stress-free travel every time.
services.airport.features.meetgreet.desc: Be greeted with a personalized tablet sign and enjoy complimentary water, mints, and Wi-Fi in every ride.
services.airport.features.tracking.title: Live flight tracking
services.airport.features.tracking.desc: We adapt to your flight, not the other way around, ensuring your Luxury Airport Service is always punctual.
services.airport.features.professional.d: Multilingual, punctual, and well-presented chauffeurs providing a highly discreet and professional service.
services.airport.features.luggage.title: Luggage assistance included
services.airport.features.luggage.desc: Including full luggage assistance and support for pick-up and drop-off for a hassle-free travel experience.
services.airport.faq.q1.question: How early should I book my ride before my flight?
services.airport.faq.q1.answer: Booking at least 24 hours in advance is recommended to ensure availability and smooth planning.
services.airport.faq.q2.question: What happens if my flight is delayed or arrives early?
services.airport.faq.q2.answer: Your driver monitors your flight in real time and adjusts pickup timing automatically.
services.airport.faq.q3.question: Will the driver meet me inside the terminal?
services.airport.faq.q3.answer: Yes, the driver greets you at arrivals with a name sign and assists with luggage.
services.airport.faq.q4.question: Are prices fixed or can they change after booking?
services.airport.faq.q4.answer: Prices are confirmed upfront, so there are no hidden charges or surprises later.
services.airport.faq.q5.question: What types of vehicles are available for travel?
services.airport.faq.q5.answer: Options range from executive sedans to spacious sprinter vans for groups and families.
services.airport.faq.q6.question: Is the service available late at night or early morning?
services.airport.faq.q6.answer: Yes, rides are available 24/7, including early departures and late arrivals.
services.airport.faq.q7.question: Can I travel with extra luggage or large suitcases?
services.airport.faq.q7.answer: Absolutely, just select the right vehicle size when booking for comfort and space.
services.corporate.faq.common: Common questions about our corporate transport service
services.corporate.faq.common.aiport: Common questions about our airport transfer service
ready.airport: Ready For Your Stress-Free Airport Transfer?
ready.airport.desc: Book now for premium airport transfers with professional service, ultimate comfort, timely pickups, real-time updates, and a stress-free travel experience.
ready.coorperate: Ready for your next corporate ride??
services.corporate.title: Corporate Transport
services.corporate.subtitle: Seamless Corporate Travel
services.corporate.description: Arrive in style with executive transport tailored for corporate rides, which is punctual, professional, perfectly organized, offering comfort, reliability, and a seamless travel experience every single time.
services.corporate.hero.title: Seamless Corporate Travel from Start to Finish
services.corporate.hero.description: For corporate meetings, conferences, and executive engagements, we deliver precisely timed, professional transportation built around your business agenda. Our drivers arrive ahead of schedule, manage on-site coordination, and align every movement with your itinerary. From departure to arrival, expect discreet, reliable, premium service designed to enhance productivity, confidence, efficiency, and executive-level comfort throughout every journey.
services.corporate.features.coordination: We provide a dynamic interface that updates in real time to keep your professional workflow moving fast.
services.corporate.features.professional: Discreet and professional chauffeurs, fluent in multiple languages, arriving punctually in pristine condition. The highest standard in private travel.
services.corporate.features.logistics.de: Enjoy a stress-free journey with dedicated staff handling your heavy bags and complex travel logistics.
services.corporate.faq.q1.question: Can you coordinate with multiple pickup locations for our team?
services.corporate.faq.q1.answer: Yes, we specialize in coordinating complex corporate logistics. We can arrange multiple vehicles for different pickup points and ensure everyone arrives at the event simultaneously. Our team handles all the scheduling and communication.
services.corporate.faq.q2.question: We would like to travel with a large group at once, is that possible?
services.corporate.faq.q2.answer: Absolutely! We have Mercedes Sprinters with various capacities up to 28 seats. Additionally, you can also request multiple vehicles simultaneously.
services.corporate.faq.q3.question: What services are available for business and executive travel?
services.corporate.faq.q3.answer: We handle airport pickups, meeting transfers, client rides, VIP travel, and group movements. Everything is planned to keep journeys smooth, comfortable, and on time, with professional drivers and quality vehicles that help you arrive relaxed and prepared for your day.
services.corporate.faq.q4.question: How does this service help companies and professionals?
services.corporate.faq.q4.answer: It takes the pressure out of travel. With reliable scheduling and experienced drivers, you can focus on work instead of traffic or delays. Companies benefit from consistent timing, smoother logistics, and a polished experience for meetings, events, and visiting clients.
services.corporate.faq.q5.question: What vehicles are available for executive and group journeys?
services.corporate.faq.q5.answer: You can choose from luxury sedans, SUVs, vans, and minibuses, depending on your needs. All vehicles are clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, and every ride is handled by a trained driver focused on safety, discretion, and smooth travel.
services.corporate.faq.q6.question: Is the service available early in the morning or late at night?
services.corporate.faq.q6.answer: Yes, travel support is available 24/7. Whether you’re heading out before sunrise or arriving late, a professional driver is ready to ensure a calm, on-time journey whenever your schedule demands it.
services.corporate.faq.q7.question: Can trips be customized for events or group travel?
services.corporate.faq.q7.answer: Of course. Travel plans can be tailored for conferences, corporate events, or group schedules. Pickups, vehicles, and routes are arranged around your needs, making sure everyone arrives together, on time, and without unnecessary stress.
services.sightseeing.title: Private Sightseeing
services.sightseeing.subtitle: Explore Top Sights
services.sightseeing.description: Discover famous landmarks and hidden gems in refined comfort with our sightseeing service, offering smooth, relaxed journeys, flexible itineraries, and attentive professional drivers who ensure every destination is reached effortlessly and enjoyably.
services.sightseeing.hero.title: Luxury Sightseeing Experiences in the Netherlands
services.sightseeing.hero.description: Discover the Netherlands’ hidden gems and iconic landmarks with effortless comfort and personalized attention. From Amsterdam’s canals to Keukenhof’s tulip fields, our knowledgeable chauffeurs manage every detail, share local insights, provide insider tips, and ensure you enjoy every moment in style, ease, and unforgettable scenery.
services.sightseeing.locations.amsterdam: Historic canals, world-class museums, vibrant neighborhoods, and rich cultural heritage.
services.sightseeing.locations.keukenhof: Seasonal beauty at its finest with millions of blooming tulips and stunning garden displays.
services.sightseeing.locations.giethoorn: The 'Venice of the North' with peaceful waterways, thatched-roof houses, and serene boat rides.
services.sightseeing.locations.zaanse.de: Traditional Dutch village with historic windmills, cheese making, and authentic crafts.
services.sightseeing.locations.hague.des: International city of peace, royal palaces, and important government buildings.
services.sightseeing.locations.rotterdam: Modern architecture, innovative design, and Europe's largest port city.
services.sightseeing.faq.q1.question: What makes your sightseeing tours different from standard tours?
services.sightseeing.faq.q1.answer: Our tours are private, flexible, and designed around you. We handle all driving and planning, share local insights, and let you explore at your own pace without fixed schedules, crowded buses, or rushed stops.
services.sightseeing.faq.q2.question: Do you provide private chauffeurs for sightseeing tours?
services.sightseeing.faq.q2.answer: Yes, every sightseeing tour includes a professional chauffeur who focuses on comfort, timing, and local knowledge. Your driver manages the route and logistics so you can relax and enjoy each destination stress-free.
services.sightseeing.faq.q3.question: Can I choose the places I want to visit during the tour?
services.sightseeing.faq.q3.answer: Absolutely. We tailor each tour to your interests, whether you want famous landmarks, cultural highlights, scenic routes, or hidden local spots. The itinerary can be adjusted before or during the journey.
services.sightseeing.faq.q4.question: What type of vehicles do you use for sightseeing tours?
services.sightseeing.faq.q4.answer: We offer premium vehicles ranging from luxury sedans to spacious vans. All vehicles are modern, clean, and comfortable, making them ideal for couples, families, and groups seeking a refined travel experience.
services.sightseeing.faq.q5.question: Are your sightseeing tours suitable for international visitors?
services.sightseeing.faq.q5.answer: Yes, we regularly serve international guests. Our chauffeurs are experienced, professional, and multilingual, helping visitors feel comfortable while sharing useful local tips throughout the journey.
services.sightseeing.faq.q6.question: Can sightseeing tours be combined with airport pickup or drop-off?
services.sightseeing.faq.q6.answer: Yes, we can seamlessly combine tours with arrivals or departures. This allows you to make the most of your time by exploring destinations comfortably before or after your flight.
services.sightseeing.faq.q7.question: How do I book a sightseeing tour with your company?
services.sightseeing.faq.q7.answer: Booking is simple. Choose your preferred tour, vehicle, and timing, then confirm your details. Our team takes care of the rest to ensure a smooth, personalized sightseeing experience.
services.touring.title: Luxury Touring
services.touring.subtitle: Multi-Day Luxury Tours Across Europe
services.touring.description: Experience seamless multi-destination travel across Europe with our professional chauffeurs, who expertly manage every detail. Enjoy comfortable, stress-free journeys, flexible itineraries, and truly premium service, ensuring every trip is smooth, relaxed, and unforgettable from start to finish.
services.touring.hero.title: Your European Adventure Awaits
services.touring.hero.description: Explore the Netherlands and beyond on multi-day journeys through Belgium, Germany, and France, thoughtfully combining Touring Amsterdam with a personalized Amsterdam Countryside Tour experience. Here, expert local knowledge, careful planning, and smooth, seamless logistics create a truly relaxed, comfortable, and luxurious experience at your own pace, always. Our professional chauffeurs ensure every detail is handled, every destination is reached effortlessly, and every moment allows you to fully enjoy the beauty, culture, and charm of each remarkable location throughout your journey.
services.touring.features.multiday.title: Multi-Day Itineraries
services.touring.features.multiday.desc: Extended tours from 2 days to 2 weeks, covering multiple destinations across Europe.
services.touring.features.expert.title: Expert Local Guides
services.touring.features.expert.desc: Knowledgeable chauffeur with deep local expertise and cultural insights.
services.touring.features.luxury.title: Luxury Accommodations
services.touring.features.luxury.desc: We can arrange premium hotels and dining experiences throughout your journey.
services.touring.features.flexible.title: Flexible Scheduling
services.touring.features.flexible.desc: Adapt your itinerary on the go based on weather, interests, or spontaneous discoveries.
We arrange luxury hotels and dining experiences throughout your journey.
services.touring.features.flexibility.de: Adjust your itinerary as you go, with the freedom to explore at your own pace.
services.touring.features.expertise.desc: Our chauffeurs share insider knowledge and hidden gems along the way.
services.touring.destinations.netherland: 3-5 day comprehensive tour covering Amsterdam, Keukenhof, Giethoorn, and traditional villages.
services.touring.destinations.benelux.de: 7-10 day tour through Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg's highlights.
services.touring.destinations.europe.des: 10-14 day luxury tour visiting Amsterdam, Brussels, Paris, and other European gems.
services.touring.plans.netherlands.title: Grand Netherlands Tour
services.touring.plans.netherlands.desc: 3-5 days exploring Amsterdam, The Hague, Rotterdam, Keukenhof, and hidden gems throughout the country.
services.touring.plans.benelux.title: Benelux Adventure
services.touring.plans.benelux.desc: 5-7 days through Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg, including Brussels, Antwerp, and Luxembourg City.
services.touring.plans.europe.title: European Grand Tour
services.touring.plans.europe.desc: 7-14 days across multiple European countries, customized to your interests and travel style.
services.touring.faq.q1.question: What types of private travel experiences do you offer?
services.touring.faq.q1.answer: We offer personalized city experiences, countryside escapes, multi-day journeys, and cross-border travel. Everything is planned around what you enjoy, your timing, and your comfort, while professional chauffeurs take care of the driving and details.
services.touring.faq.q2.question: Can I customize my itinerary and stops?
services.touring.faq.q2.answer: Yes, absolutely. Your journey is built around you. You decide where to go, how long to stay, and when to continue, with the freedom to adjust routes and stops even during the trip.
services.touring.faq.q3.question: Do you offer trips that last one day or more?
services.touring.faq.q3.answer: Of course. We plan short trips around the city, full-day trips, and longer trips to several places, all of which are tailored to your travel style and pace.
services.touring.faq.q4.question: Are your services good for people from other countries?
services.touring.faq.q4.answer: Yes. We help international guests with local knowledge, smooth travel, and clear communication on a regular basis. This makes travel easy and comfortable from the time they arrive until the time they leave.
services.touring.faq.q5.question: What kinds of cars are available for private trips?
services.touring.faq.q5.answer: We have a fleet of luxury sedans, SUVs, and big vans. All of the cars are new, comfortable, and well-maintained so that you have a smooth and pleasant ride.
services.touring.faq.q6.question: Can experiences be combined with picking up or dropping off at the airport?
services.touring.faq.q6.answer: Yes. Many guests book arrival or departure services along with their trip so they can see more places without having to change trains or waste time.
services.touring.faq.q7.question: How can I set up a private experience with your company?
services.touring.faq.q7.answer: It's easy to make a reservation. Tell us when you're going, what you want to do, and how many people will be in your group, and we'll make a plan just for you with clear prices and help from professionals every step of the way.
services.group-events.title: Groups & Events
services.group-events.subtitle: Luxury group transportation for special occasions
services.group-events.description: Professional chauffeur services for weddings, corporate events, conferences, and celebrations with seamless coordination for groups of all sizes.
services.group-events.hero.title: Premium Groups & Event Transportation
services.group-events.hero.description: From intimate gatherings to large corporate events, we provide seamless luxury transportation for groups of all sizes. Our professional coordination ensures every guest arrives on time and in style.
Comprehensive transportation solutions for events spanning multiple days with dedicated vehicles.
services.group-events.features.expert.de: Professional event logistics and coordination services to ensure flawless execution.
services.group-events.features.luxury.de: Premium vehicles including Mercedes Sprinters, V-Class, and coaches for groups up to 89 passengers.
Customized solutions tailored to your specific event requirements and schedule.
services.group-events.destinations.nethe: Elegant transportation for your special day with luxury vehicles and professional service for the wedding party and guests.
services.group-events.destinations.benel: Executive transportation for conferences, seminars, and business gatherings with seamless logistics.
services.group-events.destinations.europ: Complete transportation solutions for concerts, sports events, and celebrations with multiple vehicle coordination.
services.group-events.faq.q1.question: How many people can you transport for a group event?
services.group-events.faq.q1.answer: We can accommodate groups from 1 to 100+ people with our diverse fleet including sedans, vans, Sprinters (up to 28 passengers), and coaches (up to 89 passengers). We can also coordinate multiple vehicles for larger groups.
services.group-events.faq.q2.question: Do you provide services for multi-day events?
services.group-events.faq.q2.answer: Yes, we specialize in multi-day event transportation with dedicated vehicles and drivers for the entire duration of your event. We handle all logistics and coordination to ensure seamless service throughout.

about.title: About Holland VIP Transfers
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for luxury transportation in the Netherlands and beyond.
about.hero.title: Excellence in luxury transport since 2003
about.hero.description: For over two decades, Holland VIP Transfers has been the premier choice for discerning travelers seeking reliable, luxurious, and professional transportation services. From our base in Amsterdam, we serve clients across the Netherlands and Europe with an unwavering commitment to excellence.
about.story.title: Our story
about.story.description: Founded in 2003 with a single Mercedes and a vision for exceptional service, Holland VIP Transfers has grown into the Netherlands' most trusted luxury transport company. We've built our reputation on three pillars: reliability, luxury, and personal service. Every journey we undertake reflects our commitment to exceeding expectations.
about.values.title: Our values
about.values.reliability.title: Reliability
about.values.reliability.desc: Punctuality and dependability in every service we provide.
about.values.luxury.title: Luxury
about.values.luxury.desc: Premium vehicles and first-class amenities for every journey.
about.values.service.title: Personal Service
about.values.service.desc: Tailored experiences that exceed your expectations.
about.values.professionalism.title: Professionalism
about.values.professionalism.desc: Discrete, courteous, and expertly trained chauffeurs.
about.stats.title: Our achievements
about.team.title: Why Choose Us?
about.team.experience.title: 20+ Years Of Experience
about.team.experience.desc: Serving over 1000 satisfied clients with excellence and building long-term relationships based on trust.
about.team.fleet.title: Premium fleet
about.team.fleet.desc: From executive sedans to luxury coaches, our vehicles are maintained to the highest standards.
about.team.chauffeurs.title: Professional Chauffeurs
about.team.chauffeurs.desc: Multilingual, punctual, and discreet drivers trained in hospitality and local knowledge.
about.team.service.title: 24/7 availability
about.team.service.desc: Round-the-clock service for all your transportation needs, whenever you need us.
about.contact.title: Ready to experience the difference?
about.contact.desc: Join thousands of satisfied clients who trust Holland VIP Transfers for their luxury transportation needs.
groupEvents.seo.title: Luxury Touring Amsterdam | Multi-Day VIP Transport Europe
groupEvents.seo.subtitle: Professional chauffeur service for multi-day luxury tours across Europe from Amsterdam
groupEvents.hero.title: Reliable Transportation for Groups and Special Occasions
groupEvents.hero.description: Experience unforgettable journeys across Europe with our premium fleet of luxury buses. From small, intimate groups to large corporate events, we deliver exceptional comfort, seamless service, and a truly luxurious travel experience every mile of the way.
groupEvents.buses.bus16.name: Mercedes Sprinter 16 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus16.description: Perfect for medium-sized groups, our luxurious 16-seater Mercedes Sprinter combines elegance, comfort, and style. Ideal for corporate events, family gatherings, airport transfers, and sightseeing tours across Europe, ensuring a premium travel experience.
groupEvents.buses.bus20.name: Mercedes Sprinter 20 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus20.description: Perfect for larger groups, our 20-seater Mercedes Sprinter delivers exceptional comfort, modern amenities, and spacious seating. Ideal for corporate trips, family travels, airport transfers, and sightseeing tours across Europe for an unforgettable journey.
groupEvents.buses.bus23.name: Mercedes Sprinter 23 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus23.description: Enjoy spacious, refined travel for large groups with our 23-seater Mercedes Sprinter. Featuring premium interiors, modern conveniences, and ample seating, it’s perfect for tours, corporate events, family trips, and memorable European journeys.
groupEvents.buses.bus28.name: Mercedes Sprinter 28 Seater
groupEvents.buses.bus28.description: Built for high-capacity travel, our 28-seater Mercedes Sprinter offers refined interiors, advanced features, and generous space. An excellent solution for conferences, large-scale events, and long-distance tours, delivering comfort, reliability, and premium travel throughout every journey.
groupEvents.cta.title: Ready to Start Your European Adventure?
groupEvents.cta.description: Contact us today to plan your custom tour with our luxury fleet. We'll help you create an unforgettable journey.
home.footer.subtitle: Experience first-class mobility with Holland VIP Transfers, offering a luxury chauffeur service designed for precision, comfort, and discretion. From executive travel to best airport transfers, we redefine premium transportation for modern business and leisure travelers.
home.how_it_works.subtitle: Enhance every journey with seamless planning and refined comfort, as our four simple steps guide you from selecting premium chauffeur to enjoying a punctual, stress-free, and luxurious travel experience worldwide tailored excellence.
